---
title: "David Boyce and Huw Williams, Forecasting urban travel: Past, present and future"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2017). David Boyce and Huw Williams, Forecasting urban travel: Past, present and future. *Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design*."
date: "2017-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_david_2017"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design
**Year:** 2017

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2017). David Boyce and Huw Williams, Forecasting urban travel: Past, present and future. *Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_david_2017,
  title = {David {{Boyce}} and {{Huw Williams}}, {{Forecasting}} Urban Travel: {{Past}}, Present and Future},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2017},
  journal = {Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design},
  volume = {44},
  number = {1},
  pages = {184--186},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  keywords = {Book review},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/XQNXRS3B/urban-travel-rl.pdf}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
